traefik-env-credential-scan-l9explore.description: Systematic .env and .git/config credential scanner from 185.177.72.61 using l9explore/1.2.2. 59 requests, all 404 via Traefik. Cannot verify current status — docker logs empty this run.

ssh-brute-force-campaign-sortico.description: Sustained SSH brute force from multiple IPs. Current window includes: 84.239.42.24, 101.96.202.228, and others. All fail at password auth (server requires key-based auth). Normal internet background noise.

traefik-web-scanner-censys-oai.description: Legitimate web crawlers: OAI-SearchBot, CensysInspect, zgrab. All benign. /robots.txt returning 404 — consider adding one.

docker-logs-empty-all-containers.description: All 3 docker log sources (infra-api-1, infra-ui-1, infra-traefik-1) returned 0 bytes at 22:48Z. Previous run at 17:00Z had data (api: 6 lines, traefik: 84 lines). Server is reachable (journald collected successfully). May indicate docker logging issue, container restart with no recent output, or collector misconfiguration.
